MentalHappy groups are fully online — available wherever you are, no local search required. Online also means access to far more topics and leaders than you'd find in your city, without the commute.

## Three steps to finding your people

No forms to fill. No insurance to navigate. Sign up and find your group.

1

### Create your free account

Sign up in under a minute. Every member is verified so the community stays private and safe for everyone in it.

2

### Find or request your group

Browse by topic, schedule, or leader. Don't see yours? Request it and we'll find a qualified leader to run it.

3

### Show up. Just listen if you want.

Join live sessions or read at your own pace. You never have to say a word until you're ready.

Therapist-recommended. Member-loved.

🩺

results.title: Welcome to MentalHappy — the platform for running support groups like real healthcare programs.
results.content:
MentalHappy is where professionals, providers, and advocates launch, fill, and manage support groups like real programs—not just meetings.

Instead of chasing members, your group gets discovered by people already searching for support.

✔ Create and launch your group in minutes
✔ Get discovered by people actively looking for support
✔ Manage members, scheduling, and attendance in one place
✔ Build consistent participation and long-term community

If you're ready to stop guessing and start growing your support group, you're in the right place.

👉 Start your group: www.mentalhappy.com

🔔 Subscribe for:

 How to grow your support group
 Tips to improve attendance and engagement
 Real strategies from group leaders [...] You support others for a living. Maybe you are a therapist, coach, advocate, or someone with lived experience who believes in the power of support groups. You have the experience to lead, but filling your group consistently can feel like a constant struggle. Many leaders are great at guiding conversations, but struggle to fill seats consistently. You post on social media, email your list, and share links everywhere, yet attendance still feels unpredictable. When turnout is low, your impact shrinks and momentum fades, making it harder to build a reliable community. At Mental Happy, we change that by helping your group get discovered by people already searching for support. Instead of chasing members, we make it easy for the right people to find your group at the right moment in a space [...] people to find your group at the right moment in a space built specifically for support communities. Create your group in minutes and add your details. Not sure what type of group to run? We highlight the most requested support topics from our community, helping you choose a group people are already looking for. Once published, members can find you, request to join, and receive automatic reminders. Manage members, schedule sessions, track attendance, collect payments, and run everything from one simple dashboard. Grow beyond your local reach and welcome members from anywhere. Your group can support people in any city or state across the country. Build a consistent attendance and create a thriving community that shows up week after week. Spend less time managing tools and more time

results.content:

Group LeaderGroup Participant

Find answers to your group questions here.

What type of groups can I run or host on MentalHappy?

answer:

You can host any non-clinical, psycho-educational group related to health, mental health, wellness, or faith. This includes groups that provide education, facilitate engaging discussions, share resources, or support people through life events and challenges. If your group helps members grow, connect, and improve their wellbeing, it’s welcome on MentalHappy.

How does this platform work?

answer: [...] Who uses MentalHappy to host groups?

answer:

Many types of leaders and organizations host groups on MentalHappy — including therapists, coaches, healthcare professionals, mental health advocates, peer supporters, nonprofit organizations, schools, hospitals, government agencies, and community groups. Some use MentalHappy to expand their private practice, some run coaching or wellness programs, and others lead peer-support or survivor-based groups. Whether you’re helping people through life changes, health challenges, relationships, or personal growth — MentalHappy makes it simple to offer psycho-educational group support

Can I host a free support group?

answer:

Yes — you can host free or donation-based groups. You can also collect donations through the app. [...] How does this platform work?

answer:

You sign up and create a virtual support group for your clients, patients, or community. You can host video group meetings, manage group participants, collect payments, and share resources — all inside the MentalHappy app (web and mobile).

How easy is it to set up a group? Do I need technical skills?

answer:

Very easy — no technical skills required. Just follow 3 simple steps and your group can be ready in about 10 minutes.

Is there a cost to host a group?

answer:

Yes — see our Pricing Page for details.

Who uses MentalHappy to host groups?

answer:
